UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Public profile configuration of a Neo platform member

username.description: A unique visual handle chosen by the user

occupation.description: The user's professional title or role

themeColor.description: Accent branding theme, e.g. cyan, emerald, violet, pink, amber

avatarUrl.description: ID or URL of selected avatar style

skills.description: List of core skills or hashtags

links.description: List of user's custom external links and labels

updatedAt.description: Server timestamp of creation or update

UserPrivateInfo.title: UserPrivateInfo
UserPrivateInfo.description: Protected user records (PII) including physical credentials and verification states

emailVerified.description: Verified status of the account email

users/{userId}.description: Accessible user handles and public visual bio blocks

users/{userId}/private/info.description: Strictly locked PII including email details, only readable/writable by owner
